roa.docketEntryComment: /AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 5 Y:PJ 6M/CTS:3/X:REMAINING TIME THROUGH HOME DETENTION WITH ELECTRONIC MONITORING/WS/DNACOMP/IND/VF4:300/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/X:$1000 RESTITUTION TO SFPD/RESTV/290/BE/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/X:APD MAY  EXAMINE AT ANY TIME ALL COMPUTERS, ELECTRONIC DEVICES, ORDIGITAL STORAGE DEVICESOWNED, POSSESED OR UNDER THE DEFENDAN'TS DOMINION AND CONTROL; APD MAY REQUIRE DEFENDANT TO INSTALL AT HIS EXPENSE EQUIPTMENT AND ORSOFTWARE TO MONITOR AND OR LIMIT HIS COMPUTER USE, THE INFROMATION GATHEREDBY SAID SOFTWARE CAN BE USED AGAINST HIM IN SUBSEQUENT COURT ACTIONS RE HISCOMPUTER USE AND CONDITIONS OF PROBATION; DEFENDANT AGREES TO BE FULLYRESPONSIBLE FOR ALL MATERIAL, DATA, IMAGES AND INFORMATION FOUND ON ALL COMPUTERS AND ELECTRONIC DEVICES DEFENDANT OWNS OR TO WHICH HE HAS ACCESS; DEFENDANT CANNOT WORK OR VOLUNTEER IN AN OCCUPATION OR POSITION WHICH TYPICALLY CATERS TO MINOR CHILDREN; DEFENFANT MAY NOT ESTABLISH AN INTIMATE RELATIONSHIP OR COHABIT WITH PERSON RESPONSIBLE FOR THE CARE OF MINOR CHILDREN WITHOUTFIRST HAVING FULLY DISCLOSED TO THAT PERSON THE NATURE OF HIS CONVICTION AND PROBATION STATUS AND NECESSITY FOR THEIR INFROMED WRITEN CONSENT; DEFENDANT MAY NOT INITIATE ESTABLISH OR MAINTAIN CONTACT WITH ANY MINOR UNDERTHE AGE OF 18 YEARS UNLESS IN THE PRESENCE OF A RESPONSIBLE ADULT AND WITHPRIOR APPROVAL FROM THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT; DEFENDANT AGREES TO CONFISCATION OF ALL DEVICES AND DATA CONTAINING PROHIBITED MATERIAL SEIZED BYLAW ENFORCEMENT; DEFENDANT AGREES TO PARTICIPATE IN POLYGRAPH EXAMINATIN IF REQUESTED AS PART OF THE SEX OFFENDER MANAGEMENT PROGRAM AND WAIVE ANY PRIVLEGE AGAINST SELF-INCRIMINATION (PC 1203,067(B)(3); DEFENDANT AGREES TO WAIVE ANY PSYCHOTHERAPIST-PATIENT PRIVILEGE TO ENABLE COMMUNICATION BETWEENTHE SEX OFFENDER MANAGEMENT PROFESSIONAL AND HIS PROBATION OFFICER (PC 290,09 AND PC 1203,067(B)(4)/X:(TERMS CONTINUED TO LINE 910)
/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:08-29-14/X:STIPULATED PROTECTIVE ORDERISFILED/TWS/DOP/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/CONTD:DISCOVERY STATUS ON 07-10-14/DOP/
